homepage.title: Your roll forming machine specialist - Dreistern
homepage.description: DREISTERN sets high benchmarks with its custom roll forming machines, high quality roll forming systems and innovative roll forming technology.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Your roll forming machine specialist - Dreistern
ROLL FORMING
SYSTEMS
STATE OF
THE ART
INNOVATIVE
SPIRIT HAS
A HOME
Your leading supplier of
customised roll forming systems
As one of the world's leading suppliers of customised roll forming systems, we innovatively drive technological progress in our industry. This is in line with our high standards, which have been associated with our name from the very beginning. We have long seen ourselves as a modern solution and full-range provider, in order to inspire our customers from a wide variety of industries in the long term.
More about us
Award-winning innovation:
Winner of the „Best Award 2025“
The
Best Award 2025
recognises technological excellence, innovation and team performance within the sheet metal working and joining technology industry.
Discover our innovation and learn more about
the technology that sets standards!
Flyer: intelligent straightening device
1949
Dr Theo Krückels founds Dreistern. Today, the company is managed by Thomas Krückels who run the company in the 3rd generation.
185
Our employees customise everything for our customers from all over the world - from development and production to various after-sales services. Over 40 patents alone speak in favour of our enormous inventive power.
2000
We have now developed and manufactured over 2,000 roll forming systems for customers all over the world. More than 10,000 different profiles are produced on these systems.
Experienced in
numerous industries
Your industry is our industry: many of our employees have been part of our team for many years and therefore have a great deal of insider knowledge. They therefore have a very good eye for how your profiles need to be structured in detail.
Automotive & Transport
Construction industry
Electrical industry
Storage & Logistics
Furniture industry
Profiling plants
Tube industry
Roll forming 4.0
is reality
At DREISTERN we have been working on the beneficial use of digitalisation and automation in the roll forming process for quite a few years. Our aim is to exploit the options that are available to us in the here and now for the benefit of our customers and prospective customers.
More
Customised roll forming machines
from the Black Forest

products.text:
2000 roll forming machines for a wide range of industries - Dreistern
2000 roll forming machines for a wide range of industries
Dreistern EN
Products
Customised solutions
are standard for us
Not only have we built more than 2,000 roll forming machines worldwide for a wide range of industries but we have also fulfilled special customer requirements based on our detailed knowledge. Amongst other things, you benefit from maximum precision and robustness as well as particular ease of use. For example, your downtime and scrap are fully minimised because you receive well thought-out and multiply-proven solutions from our extensive range.
Get an initial overview of our solution expertise here - and get in touch with us at any time. We will be happy to advise you on which type of system is best suited to your requirements.
Roll forming machines
Roll forming dies
Pre- and post-punching systems

to personally

We look forward to hearing from you.

contact_page.text:
Treten Sie mit uns in Kontakt - Dreistern
Treten Sie mit uns in Kontakt
Dreistern DE
Kontakt
Herzlich willkommen
bei DREISTERN in Schopfheim!
Nehmen Sie gerne direkt zu uns beziehungsweise zu unseren jeweiligen Ansprechpartnern Kontakt für Ihr Anliegen auf. Als leidenschaftliche Profilierexperten setzen wir immer alles daran, Sie in allen Fragen so schnell und unkompliziert wie nur möglich zu unterstützen.
Schreiben Sie uns einfach über
unser
Kontaktformular
Ihr Anliegen
bitte wählen

Willkommen
in unserer
wunderschönen Schwarzwald-Region!
Mit unserem Stammsitz in Schopfheim sind wir mitten im Dreiländereck Deutschland-Frankreich-Schweiz zuhause. Die ideale Umgebung zum Leben und zum Arbeiten – und auch für unsere Kunden immer wieder eine Reise wert. Herzlich willkommen!
